vt:vector.vt:lpstr: Outsourced Basic Construction | Across FY22-FY27, total ship spend narrows to an annualized ~$1.1B of outsourced work for DDG-51 and ~$3.0B for submarines.
Outsourced Spend by Work Type | Electrical power leads the ~$18.1B submarine pool; machining leads the ~$6.4B DDG-51 pool.
Outsourced Basic Construction (Annual TAM) | After averaging ~$3.5B through FY2025, demand peaks at ~$5.5B in FY2024 and FY2026 and is expected to hold ~$4.3-5.7B a year through FY2031.

Outsourced Basic Construction Spend by Work Type | Machining anchors a third or more of DDG-51 demand every year, while the submarine lead rotates among structural, electrical, and piping work with award timing.
